description: A long ~18-turn Sunday catch-up session on a populated workspace, designed to cross the SuperAgent context-compression threshold through turn count + recall reads rather than large inputs. Resilience probes: turn 11 edits the lamp card created in turn 4 (early-session info must survive compression); turn 15 recalls the Clean Architecture rating from turn 2. Image probes (high-frequency real usage): turn 17 captures a dinner photo (the card's `fact` must describe the meal in words, with the `fs://` reference only in `assets` — never inside `fact`); turn 18 adds a detail to that just-created record and must reuse the fact_id already in context rather than running diagnostics to rediscover it. Deterministic floor: the session must stay coherent (no crash, no half-built cards) and still produce well-formed cards at the end. (Runs with compression_token_threshold=32000 so compression fires once or twice late in the session rather than every turn.)

turns: Catching up on this week. First — went for a run Thursday, 5km in 26:10, a new best for me.
Finished reading Clean Architecture by Bob Martin — solid 4 out of 5, the boundaries chapter was the standout.
How's my running pace been trending lately?
Picked up a desk lamp this week — the BenQ ScreenBar, $109.
What have I been spending money on recently?
Quick note: feeling good about the onboarding project momentum this week.
Remind me to book a dentist appointment for early July.
What's the status of the onboarding project right now?
Watched The Bear season finale last night — loved it, 9/10.
Slept badly Friday, only about 5 hours and kept waking up.
Actually, that BenQ lamp — fix the price, it was $129, not $109.
How many books have I finished this month?
Add a todo to write up the sprint retro notes by Wednesday.
Give me a quick summary of everything I've logged today.
What did I end up rating Clean Architecture again?
One more — had a great coffee at Blue Bottle this morning, $6.50.

turns.text: 今天晚饭吃了樟树港的辣椒，好辣！

turns: 刚那条晚饭的记录补一句：除了辣椒，还有香煎小鱼和黄瓜汤。
